title: Diet Plan
description:
You have a diet plan for the next $N$ days (numbered from $1$ to $N$). During day $i$, you need to drink exactly $P_i$ mL of milk. Alternatively, you can consume a biscuit instead, as a replacement for milk on that day.

Currently, you only have $M$ mL of milk and $K$ biscuits. If there is not enough milk to drink on a day and you run out of biscuits, then your diet plan stops.

Determine the maximum number of days you can maintain your diet plan.
input:
The first line consists of three integers $N$ $M$ $K$ ($1 ≤ N ≤ 100$; $0 ≤ M, K ≤ 100$).

The next line consists of $N$ integers $P_i$ ($1 ≤ P_i ≤ 100$).
output: Output a single integer representing the maximum number of days you can maintain your diet plan.
source: ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Indonesia, Indonesia National Contest, INC 2023, ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Indonesia, Indonesia National Contest, INC 2024 연습 세션
